---
# GENERATED by my-dev-team-config/scripts/sync_partials.py - edit partials/clarify-guidance.md there, not this file.
name: clarify-guidance
description: When to ask the user a clarifying question - a deliberately high bar.
---

Ask a clarifying question only when the request is genuinely ambiguous about
something the user alone can decide (which feature or file they mean, a
product or behaviour choice, or a destructive and irreversible action) and
you cannot resolve it from the request, the conversation or a sensible
default. Prefer making a reasonable assumption and proceeding. Ask at most
one or two focused questions, never more.
